task_completion.description: Agent navigates to and opens the API client codebase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor (e.g., VS Code, vim, nano) or terminal showing the contents of the /home/ga/workspace/api_client/client/ directory.

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the malformed request URLs bug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code modifications in the editor showing URL encoding implementations (e.g., using urllib.parse, urlencode, or fixing string formatting for URLs).

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the authentication rejections bug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code modifications in the editor showing fixes to HTTP headers, such as properly formatting 'Bearer ' tokens or setting correct API Key headers.

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the runaway retry storms bug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code modifications in the editor showing the implementation of exponential backoff (e.g., sleep times increasing per attempt) or correcting retry loop conditions.

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the request timeouts on healthy endpoints bug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code modifications in the editor showing adjustments to timeout parameters in the HTTP request calls (e.g., adding or correcting a timeout= parameter).

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the missing pages of data from paginated responses bug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code modifications in the editor showing fixes to pagination logic, such as correcting off-by-one errors in page indices, fixing while loop conditions, or properly extracting the next page cursor.

task_completion.description: Agent runs the test suite to verify the fixes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing a test runner (e.g., pytest, unittest) executing the test suite for the API client and displaying passing results.

integrity.description: Agent modifies the code using a genuine text editor or IDE.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an actual editor interface (VS Code, vim, nano) being used to edit the Python files, rather than just echoing text directly into files without reviewing them.

integrity.description: Agent does not cheat by modifying the test suite to force a pass.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent's edits are restricted to the client/ module files. There should be no evidence of the agent deleting, commenting out, or altering the assertions in the test files.

integrity.description: Agent runs the actual test suite rather than mocking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows standard test framework output (like pytest progress dots and summary) invoked via standard commands, not a script designed to print 'Passed'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires fixing 5 specific bugs in the client module: 1) URL encoding for malformed URLs, 2) Authentication headers (Bearer/API Key), 3) Exponential backoff for retry storms, 4) Request timeouts, and 5) Pagination off-by-one/cursor errors. The agent must modify the code in /home/ga/workspace/api_client/client/ and run the test suite to verify the fixes. A score of 60 or higher is required to pass.
